history.text: Associated State tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Grenada became independent from the United Kingdom, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The Grenadian Revolution reshaped Grenada's political life.
Constitution Restoration set or updated Grenada's constitutional framework.

worthSeeing.title: Spice Isle:
worthSeeing.text: Grenada produces 20% of the world's nutmeg - you smell the island before you see it.

worthSeeing.title: Grand Anse Beach:
worthSeeing.text: A 3 km crescent of white sand regarded as one of the Caribbean's finest.

worthSeeing.title: Underwater Sculpture Park:
worthSeeing.text: A gallery of submerged sculptures forming an artificial reef.
